hub_subtitle: Business English para Finanças Corporativas, Entrevistas e Carreira Internacional

lesson.menu_title: Diagnostic Session -- Who Is Felipe Pimenta in English?
lesson.menu_desc: Telling your CFO story in an international screening call -- 32 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 1 -- Diagnostic Session
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Felipe Pimenta | Aula 1 -- Diagnostic Session

listenings.text: Hello Felipe, this is Sarah Whitmore from Hartley and Vance, an executive search firm in London. I am calling about the Chief Financial Officer position I mentioned in my message last week. Our client is a payments company with offices in London and Lisbon, and they are looking for a finance leader with a background in private equity and high growth technology. I have read your profile carefully, and your experience with budgets, forecasts and investor reporting is exactly what they need. The first conversation would be a thirty minute call in English with the chief executive. Please call me back this week and let me know if you are interested. I look forward to speaking with you soon.

Good morning, everyone, and thank you for joining our quarterly update. I want to start with the numbers. Our earnings grew by eighteen percent this quarter, and our gross margin is now the strongest it has been since we founded the company. Cash flow is healthy, and we are still comfortably inside the budget we approved in January. Our forecast for the next quarter is cautious but positive. We have not increased our headcount since March, and I want to keep the team lean while we grow. I also want to thank our finance team, who have worked very hard this year to give us numbers we can trust. Our stakeholders have noticed, and so have I. Let us keep this discipline going.

tips: I oversee... and I report to...

items.situation: "How long have you worked in finance?"
tips: I've worked in corporate finance since 2014.

items.situation: "What did you do before this role?"
tips: Before that, I spent two years in private equity.
I'm responsible for the budget, the forecast and investor reporting.
I deal with investors and the board.
We've just closed our first funding round.

items.situation: "Why do you want to work abroad?"
